title: UNIGLOVES Unicare Latex GS0013 Examination - Multipurpose, Powder Free Disposable Gloves, Box of 100 Gloves, Natural, Medium (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Unicare Soft are incredibly comfortable medical-grade, powder-free single-use latex gloves that can be used across a range of industries, including healthcare, cleaning and food processing
High-quality natural latex offers superior levels of elasticity, comfort and tear resistance, with an ambidextrous fit that makes these gloves easy to put on when you’re in a hurry
Touchscreen-compatible for your convenience, the medium-weight construction provides a balance of strength and sensitivity, with a reduced risk of latex allergies (Type I sensitisation)
Textured latex provides superior grip, confidence, performance and safety, especially in wet or oily conditions; the beaded cuff offers extra strength during donning and prevents liquid roll back
Medical-grade disposable gloves with a pinhole AQL of 1.5. Tested for compliance to EN374-1 (protection against dangerous chemicals), and EN1186 (food safe)
description: From the manufacturer Unicare by Unigloves Our Unicare disposable glove range provides all-day comfort and protection. Unicare gloves consist of both non-medical and medical grade options which are particularly suited to use in healthcare examination, dental and veterinary care. We create protective gloves that provide comfort, durability and performance. We’ve been manufacturing reliable, hand protection solutions since 1989, exploring and adopting the latest technologies to deliver gloves that suit your needs. Unigloves Unicare Latex GS001* Latex examination gloves The Unicare latex gloves from Unigloves provide strong durability and a superior level of protection and are suitable for contact with all food types. Designed to help improve grip even when handling liquids with full palm and finger texture while also ensuring comfort and protection. AQL1.5 Free from powder and phthalates Tested to EN1186 Ambidextrous Manufactured using high-quality latex Beaded cuff Medium-weight construction Touchscreen compatible Reduced risks Meets medical standards for pinholes Reduces risks of latex allergies (Type I sensitisation) and minimises particulate contamination Use Suitable for use with mobile and tablet displays without removing gloves Suitable for contact with all food types Material Textured palms and fingertips provide improved grip, particularly when working in wet or oily conditions Medium-weight construction provides a balance of strength and sensitivity Versatility Beaded cuff provides extra strength during donning and helps prevent liquid roll back Keeping you safe Every Unigloves product is designed to deliver on our brand promise: “KEEPING YOU SAFE." We’re tough with ourselves, ruthlessly discarding anything that doesn’t measure up. By understanding our customers’ needs and anticipating how they will evolve in the future, we can build on the Unigloves brand promise and develop a roadmap for personal safety both at home and in the workplace. Suitable for multiple industry sectors These latex gloves are designed for use across a range of industries, including: Care home work, Cleaning and janitorial, Dentistry, Dental hygiene, Emergency services, Food processing, General assembly, Healthcare, Hospital and clinical duties, Janitorial, Local Authority work, Painting and decorating as well as Printing Finding the right size Unigloves Unicare Latex GS001* gloves are available in sizes: Extra-Small Small Medium Large and Extra-Large Unigloves Unicare Powder Free Latex Gloves GS001* Unigloves Unicare Powderd Latex Gloves GS002* Unigloves Unicare Powder-Free Vinyl Gloves GS009* Unigloves Unicare Powder Free Vinyl Gloves GS0*** Unigloves Unicare Powdered Clear Vinyl Gloves GS007* Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,856 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,856 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,754 4.6 out of 5 stars 1,856 4.3 out of 5 stars 512 Material Latex Latex Vinyl Vinyl Vinyl Length 240 mm 240 mm 240 mm 240 mm 240 mm Thickness 0.10 mm 0.09 mm 0.06 mm 0.06 mm 0.06 mm Weight 5.7 g 5.0 g 4.5 g 4.5 g 4.5 g Ambidextrous ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Latex-free - no data - no data ✓ ✓ ✓ Phthalate-free ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Accelerator-free - no data - no data - no data - no data - no data Powder-free ✓ - no data ✓ - no data - no data Non-sterile ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓
